disclaimer: Indicative only. AI drafts, agent verifies. Not financial advice; final duties and eligibility are determined by IRAS, MAS, HDB and the buyer's bank.

absd.note: Effective 27 Apr 2023. Rate applies to the higher of price or market value.
absd.married_refund_note: First-timer SC married couples may claim full ABSD refund on a 2nd property if the first is sold within 6 months of purchase (completed property) — no extension.

bsd.note: Buyer's Stamp Duty, residential, effective 15 Feb 2023.

ssd.note: Seller's Stamp Duty, residential, holding period extended to 4 years effective 4 Jul 2025.

ltv.reduced_note: Reduced LTV applies if loan tenure > 30yr (HDB) / 35yr (private) OR loan tenure + borrower age extends beyond age 65.

hdb.grants_note: Enhanced CPF Housing Grant up to $120k (families) / $60k (singles); resale Family Grant $80k/$50k; Proximity Housing Grant $30k/$20k. Subject to eligibility.
hdb.eip_note: Ethnic Integration Policy + SPR quotas apply at block and neighbourhood level — verify live on HDB's EIP/SPR e-Service before committing.

hdb_resale: Intent to Sell (>=7 days before OTP)
Request for Value ($120, next working day)
private_resale: BSD + ABSD within 14 days of execution
